queue_item.action: Preserve the semantic boundary between immutable dependency references and broader security or execution claims.

progress.privacy_boundary: public repository files and commit metadata only

queue_item.handoff: Enumerate every GitHub Actions uses reference at a canonical commit, compare each against the reviewed manifest, and bind the result to commit-specific workflow execution evidence.

coordination_note: This append-only queue update avoids replacing concurrent team-owned records in operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json.
